sentences.english: There were cyber attacks on shops, and hot on the heels of that, there were cyber attacks on airlines.
sentences.korean: 상점에 사이버 공격이 있었고, 그에 이어 바로 항공사에도 사이버 공격이 있었어요.

sentences.english: 'Hot on the heels' means something happens immediately after something else, often unexpectedly.
sentences.korean: 'hot on the heels'는 무언가가 다른 것 바로 뒤에, 종종 예상치 못하게 일어난다는 뜻이에요.

sentences.english: Events happen one after the other with not much of a break.
sentences.korean: 사건들이 쉴 틈 없이 연이어 일어나요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
